title: Pro User, Advanced Certification
excerpt: I was considering looking at taking the core & advanced monday.com certifications, but I don’t have enterprise and my company’s team is smaller, so I do not expect we will go to enterprise, and so I do not have access to…

posts.author: sandy459333 (Sandy Esraeil)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was considering looking at taking the core & advanced monday.com certifications, but I don’t have enterprise and my company’s team is smaller, so I do not expect we will go to enterprise, and so I do not have access to “workflows” - how can I get experience with them (as per the terms of attending the advanced workshop) since we are on the Pro plan?

I chatted in and was told it’s not possible as a Pro user. And I want to know how to do it, because we are always changing how we do things and adding things in.
